TRON announced the integration of the TRON network with NEXUS's CROSS Pay infrastructure, where USDT TRC 20 payments are already live and fully operational on CROSS Shop. Global users now have immediate access to purchase in game items using TRC 20 USDT, settled seamlessly on the TRON network. As the core payments layer of the CROSS gamechain ecosystem, CROSS Pay features a 0% payment fee model designed to materially reduce costs for developers and publishers. Combined with TRON s high throughput, low transaction fees, and fast settlement, the integration delivers an efficient, scalable solution for high frequency gaming transactions worldwide.
